title: Scars in My Mind
lyrics: Scars are here in my mind Thinking of how you're gone Yeah the scars are here in my mind I can't hold on Scars are here in my mind Thinking all the things Yeah the scars are here in my mind Losing me every day I just think about how you ended all we built Scars are here in my mind I'll never get over this Lift me up with your guilt I don't care if you need anything again Lift me up with your guilt I don't care if you need anything from me ever again All your scars did was destroy who I was Now I won't let you be anything like that to anyone again In my mind all these scars remind me of All the scars my mind held were necessary All your self-trust, all your self-hate All that just debacles in the brain You took my grave before I knew I was dying there with you In my mind all these scars do In my mind build upon me this armor so you can't break me again Can't break me again Scars in my mind remind me how you took me Abused me, used me, mistreated the love that was me I will never get it back again I'll never get it back again Scars are left in my mind, yeah I'll never get it back again All the scars that you did left my heart obliterated Obliterated Scars you left in my mind I will never ever ever get past Scars you left in my mind You turned my past to glass I can see you in the night You're at your best I can see you're not alright Look what you've been Look what you've been Look at your choices fed That's why I said Love a bitch Don't fuck a bitch You know what I mean? Amen

lyricsSegments.text: Scars are here in my mind Thinking of how you're gone
Yeah the scars are here in my mind I can't hold on
Scars are here in my mind Thinking all the things
Yeah the scars are here in my mind Losing me every day
I just think about how you ended all we built
Scars are here in my mind I'll never get over this
Lift me up with your guilt I don't care if you need anything again
Lift me up with your guilt I don't care if you need anything from me ever again
All your scars did was destroy who I was
Now I won't let you be anything like that to anyone again
In my mind all these scars remind me of
All the scars my mind held were necessary
All your self-trust, all your self-hate
All that just debacles in the brain
You took my grave before I knew
I was dying there with you
In my mind all these scars do
In my mind build upon me this armor so you can't break me again
Can't break me again
Scars in my mind remind me how you took me
Abused me, used me, mistreated the love that was me
I will never get it back again
I'll never get it back again
Scars are left in my mind, yeah
I'll never get it back again
All the scars that you did left my heart obliterated
Obliterated
Scars you left in my mind
I will never ever ever get past
Scars you left in my mind
You turned my past to glass
I can see you in the night
You're at your best
I can see you're not alright
Look what you've been
Look what you've been
Look at your choices fed
That's why I said
Love a bitch
Don't fuck a bitch
You know what I mean?
Amen
